description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image. Set a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project and define a GRADLE_OPTS variable to disable the daemon. Add a build stage with a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, caching the build and .gradle directories with a push policy, and runs the command `gradle --build-cache assemble`. Add a test stage with a test job that uses the same cache key, pulls the cache, and runs `gradle check`. No additional rules, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
